calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-31-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yong Yao Sun in Propria Persona.

The Court denied the Petition for Spousal Property stating that the Certificate of Domestic Partnership was from the City of San Francisco, that there is no Domestic Partnership registered with the State, that Probate Code requires one from the State and that this one piece of property needs to be probated.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.
